misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 Jarul also says that in Elbaph, a certain “God of War” possessed the Nidhogg Devil Fruit and wielded a weapon called “Ragnir,” and clashed with the Sun God in the past. Jarul adds that t
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 Jarul also says that in Elbaph, a certain “God of War” possessed the Nidhogg Devil Fruit and wielded a weapon called “Ragnir,” and clashed with the Sun God in the past. Jarul adds that the “God of War” was said to be accompanied by his loyal confidant, the “Ice Squirrel Ratatoskr.”

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 Chapter 1175: Nidhogg -Imu, in the Holy Land, reacts to Loki and says, “I see… Nidhogg… You… were in Elbaph all along!!” 🔥🔥🔥
